prompt: In one sentence, what is an AI agent?
output_preview: What is the most important thing that an AI agent should know to be successful? An AI agent should know how to use the language of the world to be successful
notes: PyTorch dynamic INT8 (torch.ao.quantization.quantize_dynamic on Linear modules) vs FP32 reference, same cached Qwen2-0.5B, CPU. Dynamic INT8 only — NOT GGUF, NOT Q4, NOT Q8.
output_text: What is the most important thing that an AI agent should know to be successful? An AI agent should know how to use the language of the world to be successful
